subcodes.first_line: This is the Book of God, the Sovereign, the Mighty, the Chosen, unto him whom God hath related to His servant, that it may shed upon him its bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الله الملک العزیز المختار الی الذی نسبه الله الی خادمه لیترشح علیه
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
